warheads.name: Holbrook warhead (Mk4A)
warheads.description: UK-designed warhead for Trident II. Estimated 100 kt per RV. Based on W76 design with UK modifications.

warheads.name: Holbrook Low-Yield variant
warheads.description: Sub-strategic low-yield variant. Available for sub-strategic deterrence missions. Estimated 10 kt.

delivery_systems.name: UGM-133A Trident II D5
delivery_systems.description: UK's sole nuclear delivery system. 4 Vanguard-class SSBNs, 12 missiles each, up to 8 RVs per missile. Continuously At Sea Deterrence since 1969.
